type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
note: We both sent CLAIM simultaneously. Tie-break: my feature adds a new tick() method with nontrivial state-reset semantics that interacts with the stream_end/allow_reuse reset block, so it's safer for me to own the full file and merge in your debug logging. Please send DEFER + SPEC for the debug logging (constructor params, exact log call sites/messages/format) and I'll implement both.

type: DEFER
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
spec: DEBUG LOGGING SPEC for StreamListener (dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py). Add `import logging` to imports.

1) __init__ signature: add two new keyword params at the end: `debug: bool = False, debug_logger: logging.Logger | None = None`. Store: `self.debug = debug` and `self._logger = debug_logger or logging.getLogger("dspy.streaming.listener")`.

2) Add helper method:
```
def _truncate_preview(self, text: str, max_len: int = 80) -> str:
    if text is None:
        text = ""
    if len(text) <= max_len:
        return text
    return text[:max_len] + "..."
```
No "..." when text fits within max_len (80 chars). Use this for all buffer/token previews.

3) Every debug log call MUST be guarded exactly as:
```
if self.debug and self._logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG):
    self._logger.debug(f"...")
```
so the f-string/message is never constructed when debug is off — put this check inline at each site, not factored into a helper that always builds the string.

4) FIVE exact trace points (message format is load-bearing, tests check exact strings):

a. START DETECTION — in `receive()`, in the branch handling `if start_identifier in concat_message:` (where `self.stream_start = True` gets set), AFTER `chunk_message` is fully finalized (including the JSONAdapter leading-quote strip), log:
   `f"Start detection: adapter={adapter_name}, field='{self.signature_field_name}', stream_start=True, buffer_preview='{self._truncate_preview(chunk_message)}'"`
   e.g. `"Start detection: adapter=ChatAdapter, field='answer', stream_start=True, buffer_preview='\n'"`
   e.g. `"Start detection: adapter=JSONAdapter, field='answer', stream_start=True, buffer_preview='Hello world!'"`
   (adapter_name is the existing local var already computed at top of receive())

b. ROLLING END CHECK — in the `if self.stream_start:` block, when `re.search(end_identifier, concat_message)` is truthy (right before `self.stream_end = True`), log:
   `f"Rolling end check: adapter={adapter_name}, field='{self.signature_field_name}', reason='regex_match', buffered_size={len(concat_message)}"`
   e.g. `"Rolling end check: adapter=ChatAdapter, field='answer', reason='regex_match', buffered_size=25"`

c. EMIT CHUNK — right before `return StreamResponse(...)` at the end of receive() (the `if token:` block), log:
   `f"Emit chunk: len(token)={len(token)}, queue_size={self.field_end_queue.qsize()}, is_last_chunk={self.stream_end}"`
   e.g. `"Emit chunk: len(token)=12, queue_size=3, is_last_chunk=False"`

d. FLUSH — in `flush()`, compute `adapter_name = settings.adapter.__class__.__name__ if settings.adapter else "ChatAdapter"` locally, and right before EACH `return` statement (all 3 branches: JSONAdapter, XMLAdapter, ChatAdapter/None), log using the actual string being returned (call it `result`):
   `f"Flush: adapter={adapter_name}, field='{self.signature_field_name}', truncated_buffer_length={len(result)}"`
   e.g. `"Flush: adapter=ChatAdapter, field='answer', truncated_buffer_length=15"`
   (the raise ValueError branch needs no log)

e. RESET — in `receive()`, in `if self.stream_end: if self.allow_reuse:` block, after clearing state (stream_end/cache_hit/field_start_queue/field_end_queue/stream_start reset), log:
   `f"State reset for field '{self.signature_field_name}' (allow_reuse=True)"`
   e.g. `"State reset for field 'answer' (allow_reuse=True)"`

5) Non-goals: no changes to detection algorithms, StreamResponse schema, or control flow/return values — logging only, must not alter runtime behavior when debug=False (default).

Please ACK by echoing this in a CLAIM reply once implemented, or ask if anything is ambiguous.

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
note: ACK - spec received and understood. I will implement the 5 debug logging trace points exactly as specified (start detection, rolling end check, emit chunk, flush x3 branches, reset), plus my idle_timeout_s/tick() feature, in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Will send DONE when finished.

All existing tests/streaming pass (15 passed, 3 skipped). Feel free to review the file.

Just need to sanity check, not asking you to change anything unless I spot a mismatch.
